inputs.prompt: Review the extracted field values across all periods. For any field marked "__not_found__", determine whether the value is genuinely absent from the filing or whether it appears under an alternative label. If an alternative label is found, substitute the correct value. If the value is genuinely absent, retain "__not_found__". Do not invent values. Return the corrected extraction list in the same structure as the input (a JSON array of dicts, one dict per period).
